subject: Help connecting Salesforce
body:
Hi there,

I just signed up for Nexus and I'm trying to connect our Salesforce account. When I click "Connect Salesforce" it redirects me to login, but then I get an error saying "Authentication Failed".

I'm using my admin credentials and I'm sure the password is correct. Is there something else I need to enable in Salesforce first?

Thanks,
Sarah Mitchell
Bright Horizon Consulting
expected_action: Provide general setup and authentication guidance from product knowledge base
body_clean: Hi there, I just signed up for Nexus and I'm trying to connect our Salesforce account. When I click "Connect Salesforce" it redirects me to login, but then I get an error saying "Authentication Failed". I'm using my admin credentials and I'm sure the password is correct. Is there something else I need to enable in Salesforce first? Thanks, Sarah Mitchell Bright Horizon Consulting

subject: Question about sync timing
body:
Hello,

We're on the Professional plan and I noticed our Salesforce contacts are syncing to Marketo, but there's about a 10-minute delay. The documentation says Professional plans get real-time sync within 5 minutes.

Is this normal? Do I need to configure something differently to get faster syncing?

Best regards,
Michael O'Brien
DataFlow Solutions Inc.
expected_action: Explain real-time sync expectations and how to verify webhook configuration
body_clean: Hello, We're on the Professional plan and I noticed our Salesforce contacts are syncing to Marketo, but there's about a 10-minute delay. The documentation says Professional plans get real-time sync within 5 minutes. Is this normal? Do I need to configure something differently to get faster syncing? Best regards, Michael O'Brien DataFlow Solutions Inc.

subject: Custom field mapping not working
body:
Hi support team,

I'm trying to map our custom field "Customer_Lifetime_Value__c" from Salesforce to a field in our email platform, but I can't find it in the field mapping dropdown. The field definitely exists in Salesforce and I have access to it.

How do I get custom fields to show up in Nexus?

Thanks,
Alex Rivera
Horizon E-commerce Platform
expected_action: Explain how to refresh fields and verify permissions
body_clean: Hi support team, I'm trying to map our custom field "Customer_Lifetime_Value__c" from Salesforce to a field in our email platform, but I can't find it in the field mapping dropdown. The field definitely exists in Salesforce and I have access to it. How do I get custom fields to show up in Nexus? Thanks, Alex Rivera Horizon E-commerce Platform

subject: Encryption standards question
body:
Hi,

Our compliance team is asking about your encryption standards. Specifically:
1. Is data encrypted at rest and in transit?
2. What encryption protocols do you use?

We need this for our internal security review.

Thanks,
Margaret Chen
CTO, Pinnacle Financial Services

subject: SOC 2 report for vendor assessment
body:
Hello Nexus team,

We're evaluating your platform as part of our vendor assessment process. Can you provide your most recent SOC 2 Type II report? We're prepared to sign an NDA if required.

Also, do you have ISO 27001 certification?

Best regards,
Angela Ramirez
Fortress Cybersecurity

subject: Enterprise pricing for large deployment
body:
Hi Nexus team,

We're a 500-person investment firm evaluating your platform. We'd need:
- 20+ integrations
- Around 500,000 API calls per month
- SSO with our Okta setup
- Dedicated support

Can you provide Enterprise pricing for this scope? We're also evaluating two competitors, so timeline matters.

Bradley Thompson
Managing Partner, RedRock Investment Partners
expected_action: Acknowledge Enterprise interest, escalate to sales team for custom quote

We're also evaluating two competitors, so timeline matters. Bradley Thompson Managing Partner, RedRock Investment Partners

subject: Question about API limits
body:
Hello,

We're on Professional plan (50,000 API calls/month) but we're consistently hitting 55,000-60,000 calls. I got an email saying we'll be charged overage fees.

How much is the overage cost per 1,000 calls? And would it be cheaper to just upgrade to Enterprise?

Thanks,
Jennifer Wu
Apex Technologies Group

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Daniel Chen
